name: airportstaff-dashboard

metadata.name: airportstaff-dashboard
metadata.summary: Simple library for listing/managing airport staff dashboards

documentation:
#airportstaff_dashboard Library
Simple library for listing/managing airport staff dashboards.

###Features

- Displays feedback entries as lists
- Displays found items as lists

##Installation

```bash
pip install airportstaff_dashboard

functions.name: dashboard_pkg.dashboard.airportstaffdashboard
documentation: This function is used to list founditems feddbacks in airport staff dashboard.
From database it will get all the feedbacks.
From database it will get all the fonditems that are marked as found.
It will show them as list in dashboard  for my application.
